specs.title: Augmentation Evoker

sections.heading: Talents/Gear
sections.body: Use Loktar static Midnight data as the current site baseline, with live source adapters planned later for ongoing refreshes.

sections.heading: Rotation
sections.body: Keep core buff windows rolling and plan support cooldowns around group damage windows.

sections.heading: Consumables
sections.body: Pull from Icy Veins/Wowhead once source adapters are added.

specs.title: Devourer Demon Hunter
specs.summary: New Midnight Demon Hunter spec using Void magic, Soul Fragments, mid-range pressure, and explosive Void Metamorphosis windows.

sections.heading: Talents/Gear
sections.body: Use official Blizzard Midnight Devourer notes for mechanics and Loktar static curated data for current preview gear until live source adapters exist.

sections.heading: Rotation
sections.body: Generate Soul Fragments with Consume, gather them with Reap, enter Void Metamorphosis, then maximize Collapsing Star casts.

sections.heading: Consumables
sections.body: Current consumables remain static preview entries pending stable live Midnight Season 1 sources.

sections.heading: Links
sections.body: Official Blizzard Midnight Devourer deep dive, Midnight pre-expansion notes, Wowhead, Icy Veins
